name: Légionnaire Aegis
description: Fantassin renforcé spécialisé dans la défense rapprochée, portant un lourd bouclier énergétique rectangulaire et un pistolet à impulsions. Mur vivant de la phalange martienne. Avance lentement, ne recule jamais.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Heavy infantry with large rectangular energy shield, impulse pistol, crouched defensive stance, battle-scarred urban background.
